meaning: adj.剧毒的,致命的,刻毒的,[医]有病毒的,恶毒的,充满敌意的,恶性的
examples: Now he faces virulent attacks from the Italian media.
A very virulent form of the disease appeared in Belgium.
Cholera is an extremely virulent disease.
He probably picked it up beforehand, and it was even more virulent than the hospital version.
No target is too mighty, or too obscure, for this new and virulent strain of oratory.
